overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game, showing the player character approaching and entering a neon-lit bar called 'WAGAMI' at night. The player explores the interior with its teal and pink neon lighting, visits a bathroom, and returns to the main bar area filled with NPC patrons.

transitioning from exterior night ambient light to interior neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a cyberpunk bar entrance at night, passing under a large glowing neon sign. The wet pavement reflects the vibrant green and pink lights as the player moves through the glass doorway into the interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk bar interior with neon circuit wall patterns and lounge seating

events.description: turning left to survey the bar area and circuit-patterned wall
approaching the low lounge seating area with the large WAGAMI MARKET sign

wall decorated with glowing teal circuit board patterns
large pink neon sign reading WAGAMI MARKET on the far wall
raised platform with low tables and cushioned seating
illuminated vending machine with NCOLA branding

segments.scene_description: Inside the neon-lit bar, the player explores the main floor featuring a bar counter on the right and a distinctive circuit-patterned wall on the left. The camera moves past high-top stools toward a lounge area with a large WAGAMI MARKET sign, where patrons sit at low tables drinking.

scene_state.functional_zone: small bathroom with mirror and sink

events.description: entering the bathroom doorway from the main bar area
looking down at the sink drawer and then back up toward the mirror

agents.ego_description: entering the bathroom and examining the mirror and sink area closely

entered.detail: dark doorway leading into the bathroom
large rectangular mirror with glowing frame above the sink
bright red towels hanging on wall hooks
bathroom sink with an open drawer containing items

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a corridor to a small enclosed bathroom. The space features a glowing mirror, red towels, and a sink with an open drawer. The lighting shifts from cool neon to warmer artificial light.

scene_state.functional_zone: returning through the bar toward the entrance area

events.description: exiting the bathroom back into the main neon-lit bar area
turning right to navigate around patrons toward the bar counter

agents.ego_description: exiting the bathroom and walking back through the bar, passing other patrons

notable_agents.action: woman in black outfit walking toward the bathroom area
person in white jacket standing near the bar counter

entered.detail: returning to view of the bar counter with neon lighting
the circuit-patterned wall visible again on the left

segments.scene_description: The player exits the bathroom and returns to the main bar area, passing a woman walking toward the restrooms. The camera moves past the NCOLA vending machine and back toward the bar counter, with the neon circuit walls visible again.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a rain-slicked city street into the vibrant, neon-drenched interior of a cyberpunk bar. It begins outside at night, gliding under a glowing neon sign across wet pavement that reflects vivid green and pink hues before passing through a glass doorway. As the camera enters the establishment, the outdoor darkness shifts into a saturated indoor atmosphere featuring a bar counter to the right and a circuit-patterned wall to the left. The movement then carries the viewer past high-top stools and deeper into the venue, finally opening up into a lounge area where patrons gather at low tables beneath a large WAGAMI MARKET sign.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the secluded warmth of a restroom back into the vibrant, neon-lit atmosphere of a cyberpunk bar. It begins by moving through a corridor into a small enclosed bathroom, where the lighting shifts from cool neon to warmer artificial tones reflecting off a glowing mirror and red towels. As the camera exits the restroom, the scene opens back up into the main bar area, passing a woman walking in the opposite direction. The view then glides past an NCOLA vending machine before returning toward the bar counter, where the teal and pink neon circuit walls once again dominate the environment.
